title: Category Theory Explained
description: A self-contained guide that uses category theory as a lens to make the structure and logic of Madhyasth Darshan precise — plain-language ideas first, then the formal theory — and shows where the notation stops

title: The Coexistence Template
description: The single structural template beneath Madhyasth Darshan — saturated units recognising and fulfilling relationships, exchanging value, composing into assemblies, and transmitting their method — stated formally for all four orders and usable to design or diagnose any assembly
